name: agentic-loop-monorepo
description: The agentic-loop plugins (OpenCode + Claude Code) and their shared core

scripts.prepare: npm run build -w @agentic-loop/core && npm run build -w agentic-loop-mcp
scripts.hub: npm run build -w @agentic-loop/core && npm run build -w @agentic-loop/hub && npm run start -w @agentic-loop/hub --
scripts.test:all: npm run test -ws --if-present && npm run test:hooks
